name: @stimulir/code-runtime-vibe
description: Stimulir-flavored Mistral Vibe adapter. Spawns the `vibe-acp` Python binary (from `pip install mistral-vibe`) as a subprocess, speaks ACP JSON-RPC over stdio, and translates Vibe's native event stream into Stimulir's canonical trajectory event shape — the same one every other adapter (pi/codex/claude-code/opencode) emits, so Lemon Tasker can drive Vibe behind --agent stimulir-vibe with no per-adapter branching. Prerequisite: `pip install mistral-vibe` so `vibe-acp` is on PATH.
